description_long: This is an American football with a classic pro-style design, featuring a brown textured leather or synthetic leather surface and two prominent white stripes near each pointed end. The ball has visible white laces running along the seam for grip and control, and a large black Nike swoosh logo is printed on one side, indicating the brand. The opposite side displays a different logo, possibly a league or manufacturer mark, in black. The football's surface appears slightly pebbled, providing a tactile, grippy feel suitable for throwing and catching. The object is inflated, giving it a firm, rounded shape with pointed tips at both ends. There are no visible signs of wear, scuffing, or deformation, suggesting it is in new or nearly new condition.
description: A brown American football with white stripes, white laces, and a black Nike logo, featuring a textured, grippy surface and a firm, inflated shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Nike logo, white laces, and two white stripes on the brown surface.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the pointed tip, white laces, and a full white stripe encircling the end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a different black logo, white laces, and the two white stripes.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing the pointed tip, white laces, and the white stripe encircling the end.
